name: TA Bloomsburg (TravelCenters of America)
description: Full-service TravelCenters of America truck stop at I-80 Exit 232 with a Country Pride restaurant, Subway, roughly 190 truck spaces and on-site truck service bays.

name: Love's Travel Stop #324
description: 24-hour Love's Travel Stop at I-80 Exit 242 with Arby's, seven diesel lanes, showers and truck parking.

name: Pilot Travel Center #298
description: 24-hour Pilot Travel Center at I-80 Exit 256 (PA 93) with Subway, seven diesel lanes, five showers and truck parking.

name: Onvo Travel Plaza - Hickory Run (AMBEST)
description: Independent AMBEST travel plaza (formerly Hickory Run) at I-80 Exit 274 with 24-hour diesel, restaurant, convenience store and showers.

name: Pocono Mountain Travel Plaza
description: Independent full-service truck stop at I-80 Exit 302 offering gas and diesel, fast food/restaurant and a repair shop.

name: CAT Scale - TA Bloomsburg
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the TA Bloomsburg travel center at I-80 Exit 232.

name: CAT Scale - Love's Mifflinville
description: Certified CAT Scale located at Love's Travel Stop #324 at I-80 Exit 242.

name: CAT Scale - Pilot Drums
description: Certified CAT Scale located at Pilot Travel Center #298 at I-80 Exit 256.

name: CAT Scale - Onvo Hickory Run
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the Onvo Travel Plaza - Hickory Run at I-80 Exit 274.

name: Bartonsville Truck Wash
description: Truck wash near I-80 Exit 302 on Route 611 offering wash service, truck parking, showers and a driver lounge.

name: Service Tire Truck Centers (STTC) - Mifflinville
description: Commercial truck tire sales and service center near I-80 Exit 242 providing medium-duty tire work, alignment and 24-hour road service.

name: Nescopeck DOT Inspection Station (Eastbound)
description: Eastbound I-80 truck weigh/DOT inspection site near mile marker 250 in the Nescopeck area.

name: Nescopeck DOT Inspection Station (Westbound)
description: Westbound I-80 truck weigh/DOT inspection site near mile marker 250 in the Nescopeck area.

name: I-80 Rest Area (Exit 273 Eastbound)
description: Eastbound I-80 rest area near Exit 273 with restrooms, vending, picnic tables and limited parking.

name: I-80 East Rest Area (Mile Marker 295, Scotrun)
description: Eastbound Pocono-area I-80 rest area near mile marker 295 with restrooms, picnic area and car/truck parking.

name: TA Truck Service - Bloomsburg
description: On-site truck service shop at the TA Bloomsburg travel center offering repair bays and roadside assistance at I-80 Exit 232.

name: Love's Truck Care - Mifflinville
description: Love's Truck Care service at Love's #324 providing 24-hour tire and light mechanical roadside service at I-80 Exit 242.
